title: Nursing Aide
description: Scripps Research is one of the world's premier independent biomedical research institutes with groundbreaking discoveries in immunology, neuroscience, and infectious disease. You'll provide direct patient care support in our clinical research and patient services.
responsibilities: Provide direct patient care and support to clinical research participants
Assist with vital signs monitoring and specimen collection
Maintain clean, safe clinical environments adhering to protocols
Document patient observations and report concerns to nursing staff
Support patient comfort and address basic care needs
Assist with medical equipment operation and sterilization

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; CNA certification preferred
requirements.experience_years: 0-2 years of direct patient care or clinical research experience

benefits: Professional development and continuing education support
Employee assistance program (EAP) with mental health services
